title: T-081 — Shared release status model and guard adapters
prompt:
# T-081 — Shared release status model and guard adapters

Create or adopt the shared release status model for Technical releaseable records if no NPD-owned canonical model already exists. Model statuses and transitions for draft, in_review, rejected, approved_for_factory/released, active, superseded and blocked with typed guards. Provide adapters for factory_specs and BOM headers so UI/API tasks do not invent conflicting enums. If an NPD/shared platform release model exists, bind to it and add Technical adapters/tests only; otherwise implement the smallest shared Technical-owned model until platform extraction. RED first: illegal transitions and in-place edits of released records fail deterministically.

pipeline_inputs.description: Shared release state and typed transition guards for factory_spec/BOM Technical release.
pipeline_inputs.details: Prerequisite discovery is mandatory: search for an existing NPD/platform release model before adding a new one. If found, this task creates Technical adapters and migration compatibility only. Release state must be usable by API and UI as stable typed codes, support clone-on-write guard checks, and leave D365 sync status as a separate optional integration field.
acceptance_criteria: Given no canonical release model exists, then release-state.ts defines typed statuses/transitions and factory_specs/BOM adapters use it.
Given a canonical NPD/platform release model exists, then Technical adapters import/use it and this task does not add a conflicting enum.
Given released/approved_for_factory record receives direct update attempt, then guard returns RELEASED_RECORD_IMMUTABLE and clone-on-write path is required.
Given D365 sync status is pending/disabled/failed, then release status remains local and independent with optional integration warnings only.
Given UI asks for badge metadata, then adapter returns stable label, color token, allowed actions and blocking reason codes.
test_strategy: RED tests for legal/illegal transitions and adapter mapping.
RED repository test or assertion proving no duplicate conflicting release enum was introduced when canonical model exists.
risk_red_lines: Do not conflate local release status with D365 sync status.
Do not make NPD role ownership a prerequisite for Technical factory_spec approval.
Do not let each service invent its own release enum.
